anchor: GTA Renovation — AI quoting in under 60 seconds

posts.body_preview:
A GTA renovation company used to take 3-5 days to send a quote. Now it takes 47 seconds.

I didn't build them custom software. I wired 4 existing tools together. Here's the stack 👇

From 'we'll get back to you in a week' to 'here's your quote in 60 seconds.'

9 slides on the exact quoting agent we shipped to a GTA reno company. What it sees, what it asks, what it sends.
Monday morning journal: I used to think 'scale' meant headcount. Now I think it means how many agents you can keep pointed at the right problems at once.
If you could only keep ONE AI tool in your stack, which would it be? I'll go first: Claude Code. Everything else is replaceable.
Year one lesson from building UpliftAI: don't kill the agency to start the product. Use the agency to fund the product. Use the product to qualify the agency. They compound.
This GTA reno company used to quote in 3–5 days. Now: 47 seconds. Reel walks through the 4 tools stitched together — no custom code.
'We'll get back to you in a week' just died. I automated a reno company's quoting in an afternoon. Here's the 4-tool stack that did it.
